text:
Hello? Hello? is this thing on?
Are we live? Okay...

Good morning, people of America and
the wonderful listeners of NSBNC!

I'm Jeronica Wilkins, reporting live,
with what is the most consequential
interview of our time.

With me, inside of a computer screen,
is the President of our wonderful
country

Mr. President, I'll be blunt.
The people want answers.

Rumors are flying every which way,
theorizing about your whereabouts.

So, lets put those conspiracies to
rest. Where exactly are you right
now?

Good, good! This is your Secretary of
State. I'm receiving you loud and
clear, sir.

Tensions with the opposing nation
remain elevated.

However, our intelligence confirms no
imminent military action at this time.

You have a window to act, and how you
proceed will shape what comes next.

From the bunker, you currently have
four secure channels available to you,
sir.

You may speak with the Press to
address the American people directly.

You may reach out to a Congressman
to coordinate legislative support.

A wealthy private sector ally has also
requested talks regarding economic
measures and the conflict.

Finally, a direct line to the opposing
nation's leader has been established
and is standing by.

Who would you like me to connect to
you first?
